rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP JAMES MCFADDEN VS. DEANDRIEA MCFADDEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 05, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF PHILLIP MCFADDEN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide verifications within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $690 and will be vacated if Defendant provides timely verifications. If defendant fails to timely provide verifications, the sanctions are due within 30 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/CFH)
